case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO-OFFICE OF CITY VS. HOGUE AALIYAH

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-16-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-16-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY GRACE GLENN--CLAIMS ADJUSTER. NO COSTS, PLAINTIFF IS EXEMPT FROM COURT FEES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-16-2015 - JUDGMENT.
